svg.text: Ad Task Breakdown Board
P0 delivery package for the demo, plus the first deferred items that should not be smuggled into the month-end scope.
P0: Must Land Before 2026-04-30
Product
Lock demo script and narrative.
Define homepage IA and two core entry points.
Define diagnosis and comparison result-card fields.
Frontend
Turn the funnel page into a workbench.
Add prompt input, quick actions, and module switch.
Add execution-state, diagnosis-card, and comparison-card/table components.
Backend
Add a unified demo scene interface.
Add diagnosis mock API.
Add comparison mock API and unified response shape.
Data and Content
Prepare fixed mock steps and evidence.
Prepare comparison tables and follow-up prompts.
Prepare homepage copy and presenter language.
Delivery Completion Signals
README reflects how to run and demo the workbench.
Acceptance checklist exists and matches the actual UI/system path.
The two fixed scenarios can be run end-to-end on mock data with stable states and structured output.
These are delivery conditions, not optional documentation extras.
P1: Explicitly Deferred
Automation orchestration, real MCP abstraction, more diagnosis templates, more comparison templates, asset-agent chain, and knowledge-base foundation all stay out of the month-end demo scope.
